mapper.sql: id, username, password, phone, email, user_type, status, real_name, avatar, vip_expire_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
id, username, phone, email, user_type, status, real_name, avatar, vip_expire_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())
SELECT user_type as userTypeName, COUNT(*) as count FROM user GROUP BY user_type
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM user GROUP BY status
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM user WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
